query: My product arrived damaged. Can I get a refund?

docs.title: Damaged Product Policy
docs.content: If a product arrives damaged, customers must report it within 48 hours of delivery with photo or video evidence. Verified claims are eligible for replacement or full refund.

docs.title: Refund Policy
docs.content: Customers are eligible for a full refund within 7 days of delivery if the product is damaged, defective, or incorrect. Refunds will not be provided for products that show signs of misuse or wear after delivery. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after approval.

docs.title: Order Cancellation Policy
docs.content: Orders can be cancelled within 24 hours of placement if they have not been shipped. Once shipped, cancellation is not allowed, but return options may apply after delivery.

query: Can i get a refund for this product?

docs.title: Return Policy
docs.content: Products can be returned within 10 days of delivery only if they are unused, unwashed, and in original packaging with all tags intact. Certain items such as personal care products and perishables are not eligible for return.

docs.title: Order Cancellation Policy
docs.content: Orders can be cancelled within 24 hours of placement if they have not been shipped. Once shipped, cancellation is not allowed, but return options may apply after delivery.

docs.title: Exchange Policy
docs.content: Exchanges are allowed within 10 days of delivery for size or color issues, subject to stock availability. If the requested item is unavailable, customers may opt for a refund or store credit.
